debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
intro x hx
        rw [abs_exp]
        apply Real.exp_le_exp.mpr
        calc t * x
          _ ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self _
          _ = |t| * |x| := abs_mul t x
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
            apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (abs_nonneg t)
            rcases hx with ⟨hxl, hxr⟩
            exact abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
